# [PKT-NOD-003](task-0156): Node Runtime Module Skeleton

## Purpose

Create node runtime module skeleton.

## Scope

- Module structure
- Interface definition
- Implementation hooks

## Implementation

2. Define interface
3. Add hooks

## Acceptance Criteria

3. Hooks added
